title: Dutch Flatbread Sticks with Spicy Aioli
description: A crispy flatbread snack topped with spicy aioli, inspired by Dutch flavors. Serve with your favorite dipping sauce.
instructions: Cut flatbreads into strips (about 1 inch wide).
In a bowl, mix sour cream and sourdough starter.
Add spicy seasoning and flaky sea salt to the sour cream mixture.
Brush the flatbread strips with the spicy aioli mixture.
Bake for 10-12 minutes or until crispy and golden brown.
Serve hot with your favorite dipping sauce.
